title: Ice or Stabilize
intendedTensionBeat: The key ice break is urgent, but taking it at the wrong moment leaves the dock unstable.
intendedReleaseBeat: A planned stabilizing triple before or immediately after the ice break makes the rescue feel controlled.
expectedPath: Make one route-progress clear, stabilize dock with a clean triple, then break the key ice and finish the urgent rescue.
expectedFailMode: Player either overprotects dock and delays the ice break, or rushes ice and overflows from route residue.
designNotes: This is the band’s dock integration pressure level. The best path should feel disciplined, not exact-sequence hidden.
